name: agent-passport-system
description: Enforcement infrastructure for the agent economy. Policy eval <2ms, 15 constraint dimensions, 403 ops/sec. Ed25519 identity, scoped delegation, Bayesian reputation, gateway enforcement, feeless Nano payments, Merkle attribution, agent attestation, institutional governance. 99 modules. 2,085 tests.
